meaning: n.证书,证明书vt.发给证明书,以证书形式授权给...
examples: He was shown a photocopy of the certificate.
She's going in for the Cambridge First Certificate.
She didn't like the course but she stuck it out to get the certificate.
For instance, a death certificate allows the person's property to be distributed to heirs.
She has ordered a medical certificate to be compiled explaining his "current position and prognosis".
